title: epipactis phyllanthes subsp. campeadorii
intro: Epipactis phyllanthes subsp. campeadorii, also known as the Spanish orchid, is a rare and endemic species of orchid that is found in the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Epipactis phyllanthes subsp. campeadorii can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
